title: Maisy's Vanilla Plus
description: This is my own personal vanilla+ pack, it mostly adds quality of life improvements and some minor gameplay mods, mostly for new biomes
body:
Welcome to Maisy's vanilla plus pack. I know this is a little bit of a common thing, but this is my specific list of mods that I like. There likely wont be major changes to the mod list. This pack for the most part includes optimization mods and visual improvements, but it also contains a few mods to add extra biomes to the game to make exploration more fun.

This modpack includes [Illuminations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations) and [Effective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective), [Incendium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/incendium), [Falling Leaves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric), and the [Visual Traveler's Titles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/visual-travelers-titles) resource pack. None of the mods in this pack are made by me, and I claim no rights to any of the mods or resource packs contained within this pack. Please support the creators of all the mods and resource packs in any way you can.
